user.title: Connect to Samsung AC
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Samsung air conditioner's Wi-Fi module.

token.title: Get an authentication token
token.description: Choose how to provide the authentication token for this device.

menu_options.capture: Capture a new token from the AC

capture.title: Capture a new token
capture.description:
1. Turn the air conditioner OFF.
2. Select Submit below.
3. Turn the air conditioner back ON within about 40 seconds.

The AC issues a new token when it powers on while this step is waiting.

paste.title: Enter an existing token
paste.description: Paste the authentication token you already have for this device.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Samsung AC
reauth_confirm.description: The stored token for this AC was rejected — the unit's memory was likely reset (e.g. after a power loss). Capture a new token from the AC or paste one you already have.

menu_options.capture: Capture a new token from the AC

error.no_token: No token was received from the AC. Turn it off, select Submit, then turn it back on within about 40 seconds.
error.auth: The AC rejected this token. Check that it's correct and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the AC at this IP address. Check the address and that the device is powered on.
